symptom: Render fails with GL error, display error, or blank PNG
fix: Use CYCLES engine. Set scene.render.engine='CYCLES'; scene.cycles.device='CPU'. EEVEE Next is unsupported headless on Windows.

symptom: Script args parsed as Blender args; sys.argv contains no custom args after parse
fix: Always place -- between the script path and custom args: blender -b scene.blend -P s.py -- --myarg value

symptom: GUI window flickers/blocks CI; openscad appears to hang
fix: Call openscad.com (the console binary), NOT openscad.exe. The .com binary is the headless version on Windows.

symptom: 'python3' is not recognized as a command
fix: Use 'python' not 'python3' on Windows. Python installs as python.exe; python3.exe is typically absent.

symptom: Script crashes or emits garbled output with non-ASCII characters (degree symbols, accents)
fix: Add UTF-8 stdout wrapper at script top: import sys,io; if sys.stdout.encoding and sys.stdout.encoding.lower()!='utf-8': sys.stdout=io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer,encoding='utf-8')

symptom: First column header has BOM prefix (e.g. 'ï»¿format' not 'format'); zero results for first column lookups
fix: Open CSV with encoding='utf-8-sig' (the -sig strips BOM): open(path,'r',encoding='utf-8-sig')

symptom: Render output goes to wrong location or is not found; path starts with //
fix: Use absolute forward-slash paths in scene.render.filepath. Never use // (relative). Example: 'C:/project/out/render_'

symptom: Character imports 100x too large (2m height shows as 200 units in bounding box)
fix: Blender FBX import: apply_unit_scale=True. Blender FBX export to UE5: apply_scale_options='FBX_SCALE_ALL'. assimp CLI has no direct scale fix - use Blender.

symptom: Bounding box wrong in engine; scale mismatch; rigging breaks; wrong size
fix: Apply transforms before export: bpy.ops.object.transforms_apply(rotation=True, scale=True). Check Item panel: scale must be 1,1,1.

symptom: Normals appear inverted in engine (dark patches on outward surfaces); physics wrong
fix: Apply scale (Ctrl+A -> Scale) then Mesh -> Normals -> Recalculate Outside. Caused by S X -1 mirror without applying.

symptom: GLB file is 50-100x larger than expected (100-segment road -> 56 MB)
fix: Set export_apply=False in bpy.ops.export_scene.gltf(). Only bake modifiers when engine cannot interpret them.

symptom: Shading artifacts on smooth surfaces after import (triangle star patterns)
fix: Triangulate in Blender before export: Mesh->Faces->Triangulate Faces. Or add Triangulate modifier.

symptom: Material.001, Material.002 inflating draw calls; wrong materials in-engine
fix: Search: [m.name for m in bpy.data.materials if re.search(r'\.\d{3}$', m.name)]. Merge duplicates via Material Properties.

symptom: Blender silently fails to export; Python open() raises FileNotFoundError; path > 260 chars
fix: Enable long paths: Set-ItemProperty -Path HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\FileSystem -Name LongPathsEnabled -Value 1. Keep paths under 150 chars.

symptom: Subtle incorrect shading on normal-mapped surfaces; not obvious at low res
fix: Normal maps must use Non-Color/Linear color space in Blender Image texture node. _BC/_E = sRGB; _N/_ORM/_R/_M = Non-Color.

symptom: Inconsistent patchy shadows in baked lightmaps; bleed between faces
fix: LightmapUV (channel 2) MUST have zero overlapping islands. Use Blender Lightmap Pack with margin=0.02.

symptom: Animated GLB shows T-pose or broken animation after Draco compression
fix: Draco only compresses static vertex buffers. Use Meshopt for animated assets: gltf-transform meshopt or gltfpack -cc.

symptom: Visible cracks/gaps in mesh after Draco compression, especially at seams or on large models
fix: Use --quantize-position 20 (default is 14). gltf-transform draco input.glb out.glb --quantize-position 20

symptom: gltf-transform etc1s / uastc fails: 'toktx not found'
fix: Add C:\Program Files\KTX-Software\bin to PATH. Temp: $env:PATH += ';C:\Program Files\KTX-Software\bin'

symptom: KTX2 textures load but display uncompressed RGBA; no GPU savings; detectSupport silently no-ops
fix: Call ktx2Loader.detectSupport(renderer) AFTER new THREE.WebGLRenderer(). Needs live WebGL context.

symptom: gltfpack -tc flag silently ignored; no texture compression despite flag
fix: npm version is a JS wrapper without texture encoder. Download native gltfpack-windows.zip binary from meshoptimizer releases.

symptom: npm install fails on Sharp prebuilt binary download
fix: Set npm config: npm config set sharp_binary_host 'https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/sharp'

symptom: Scene with WebP KTX2 textures hits VRAM limit despite small file sizes
fix: WebP decompresses to RGBA on GPU upload. 200 KB WebP = 16 MB GPU at 2048x2048. Use KTX2 (ETC1S/UASTC) when GPU memory is the constraint.

symptom: DRACOLoader fails with 404 on draco_wasm_wrapper.js
fix: Copy node_modules/three/examples/jsm/libs/draco/ to public/static/draco/. Trailing slash required in dracoLoader.setDecoderPath('/static/draco/').

symptom: FBX exported via assimp export -ffbx loses rigs, blend shapes, wrong transforms
fix: assimp FBX export is marked 'experimental'. Use Blender bpy.ops.export_scene.fbx() for FBX output.

symptom: assimp listext does not show .usd/.usda/.usdc extensions
fix: USD importer compiled out by default. Build assimp with -DASSIMP_BUILD_USD_IMPORTER=ON. Use Blender for production USD workflows.

symptom: Alembic plays only 1 frame; animation collapsed to static pose
fix: Explicitly set start and end in bpy.ops.wm.alembic_export(start=scene.frame_start, end=scene.frame_end). Defaults are -2147483648.

symptom: Root bone has unexpected -90 degree rotation in exported GLB (.rotation.x = -Math.PI/2 in Three.js)
fix: This is CORRECT behavior per glTF spec. Blender inserts coordinate-change at root. THREE.js GLTFLoader handles it automatically. Do NOT set export_apply=True to fix it.

symptom: Model narrates 'next run forge-X' but nothing actually executes
fix: Run = call the Skill tool with exact skill name. Writing 'now run forge-X' in prose runs nothing. This is the single most documented failure mode.

symptom: Skill produces output contradicting project's established tool choices, budgets, or paths
fix: Read FORGE.md first as step 0. Every forge-* skill must honor FORGE.md values over dataset defaults.

symptom: toktx not found / not on PATH; KTX2 texture compression step fails mid-optimize
fix: Fall back to --texture-compress webp (gltf-transform, ImageMagick-based): npx gltf-transform optimize in.glb out.glb --meshopt --quantize --texture-compress webp. KTX2 is an optimization, not a requirement; WebP saves bandwidth but not GPU VRAM. To get KTX2, install KhronosGroup/KTX-Software and add its bin to PATH.

symptom: QA renders of an unchanged mesh differ frame-to-frame (noise drift); cannot diff for visual regressions; compare-loop never converges
fix: Pin determinism: scene.cycles.seed=0 and scene.cycles.use_animated_seed=False; also fixed (non-adaptive) sample count, scene.cycles.device='CPU', blender --factory-startup, absolute output paths. Persist the seed + Blender version in FORGE.md Â§Determinism.

symptom: gltf_validator command not found mid-gate; FileNotFoundError raised by the validation subprocess
fix: WARN (do not hard-fail the gate) and fall back to stdlib GLB header/size checks (magic b'glTF', version, byte length) plus pygltflib schema load. Install the real validator: npm install -g gltf-validator, or download the KhronosGroup/glTF-Validator Windows zip and add it to PATH.
